Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: comics by form [300262921], comics (documents) [300015635], documents by form [300137954], document genres [300026031], information forms (objects) [300220751], Information Forms (hierarchy name) [300026029], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Sequence of illustrations containing a story or stories (called "comics," because some are humorous), often serialized, published in booklet form.
Cómics, a menudo como series, publicados en forma de folletos.
Strips die vaak in verschillende delen, in pamfletvorm worden uitgegeven.
以小書冊形式出版的漫畫，常連載刊登。
Abfolge von Bildern, die eine Geschichte oder Geschichten beinhalten ("Comics" genannt, weil manche lustig sind), häufig als Fortsetzungsgeschichte und in Heftform veröffentlicht.
Sequência de ilustrações contendo uma ou mais histórias (chamadas de "quadrinhos", porque algumas são humorísticas), muitas vezes serializadas, publicadas em forma de livreto.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)

Non-Preferred_Term.Term_Text: lian huan man hua za zhi
lián huán màn huà zá zhì
lien huan man hua tsa chih

Source.Source_ID: 2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
